title: RoundupProposal
description: A rules-based sweep/roundup PROPOSAL: the rounded amount Cash Safety suggests routing to debt/TFSA/savings per the user's plan (FR-CASH-003). Consumed by Habits (daily ritual / RoundupProposals, umbrella Module 8 Consumes list). This is RECOMMEND-ONLY: FinOS never executes the transfer; the user approves each proposal in the Confirm-Action sheet (ux-foundations §4.2) and then executes it themselves. The CONFIRMED proposal is recorded in the append-only audit trail and is IDEMPOTENT — keyed on source_event_id with a UNIQUE constraint so a retried qualifying-purchase event never double-proposes or double-records (Constitution IV; FR-CASH-003; umbrella US3 acceptance scenario 5).

source_event_id.description: Idempotency key — the qualifying-purchase event that triggered this proposal. A replay of the same source_event_id MUST return the existing proposal, never create a second one (UNIQUE; platform-decisions §4).

profile_id.description: Owning profile. Server-side authZ on the validated session identity — never a client-supplied profile_id (FR-X-010/FR-HH-001).

rule_id.description: The RoundupRule that produced this proposal (data-model.md).

trigger_txn_ref.description: Reference to the qualifying transaction (from the spine TransactionStream) that triggered the roundup. A reference only — Cash Safety does not copy raw transaction bodies.

roundup_amount.description: Amount to sweep, integer cents = roundup_target - (transaction_amount mod roundup_target), computed in integer cents (no float). Example: $4.30 purchase, round-to-$1 ⇒ 70 cents. Exactness is fixture-guarded (Money Correctness).

destination.description: Where the user's plan routes the swept amount. Cash Safety only PROPOSES the destination; it never moves funds.

account_ref.description: Optional target account id (the user's OWN account).

goal_ref.description: Optional GoalState goal_id when destination_kind = goal (drives time-to-goal contribution, FR-X-004).

goal_contribution_days.description: Optional time-to-goal contribution of this sweep in days, when destination is a goal (FR-X-004). Null when not goal-linked or not computable.

status.description: proposed = surfaced, awaiting the user's Confirm-Action approval; confirmed = the user approved it (writes an append-only audit event; the user executes the transfer externally); dismissed = the user declined; superseded = a Cash Safety micro-action paused the roundup rule (pause_roundup) so this proposal no longer applies. FinOS NEVER auto-advances to confirmed (Constitution IV / SC-007).

confirmed_at.description: UTC instant the user confirmed; null until confirmed. Rendered to the user's locale at the edge.

freshness.description: Freshness of the triggering transaction / balance inputs. A stale balance underlying the destination context flags the proposal (the roundup amount itself is exact integer math on the known transaction).
